backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a medical practice website that manages content (hero, about, services, reviews, clinics, social links, footer), image storage, user profiles, and admin authentication with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with file paths, component dependencies, and test IDs; covers hover-to-edit admin capability and advanced footer redesign.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short descriptions summarizing each component's purpose, props, and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, radius, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Medical Practice app that mounts the React app at `#root` and sets a clinic logo favicon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with home and admin routes, wraps everything in a custom ThemeProvider, and renders a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Public-facing About section component that displays bio text, an optional photo, and hardcoded stats with glassmorphism styling and blue-purple-magenta gradients.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutEdito: Admin editor for the About section, supporting inline bio text editing and doctor photo selection via an image picker modal, with save-to-canister functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/ClinicsEdi: Admin editor for managing clinic entries (name, address, phone, map link, photo), supporting add/remove/inline-edit operations and bulk save to the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/admin/FooterEdit: Admin editor for footer content fields (practice name, tagline, description, contact info, hours) with inline editing and a save-all button that persists to the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroEditor: Admin editor component for the hero section that allows inline editing of headline, subheadline, tagline, and background image, with save functionality backed by the actor API and React Query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImageManag: Admin component for managing uploaded images, supporting multi-file upload and deletion with confirmation dialogs, displaying images in a grid with metadata like size and upload date.
frontend/src/components/admin/ImagePicke: Modal dialog that displays the uploaded image library in a grid, allowing the user to select an image by ID with visual highlight for the currently selected item.
frontend/src/components/admin/ReviewsEdi: Admin editor for patient reviews that supports adding, removing, and inline-editing review fields (name, text, rating, date), with save-all and per-field auto-save via the actor API.
frontend/src/components/admin/ServicesEd: Admin editor for the services list that supports adding, removing, and inline-editing service fields (title, description, icon image), with image picker integration and save-all functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/SocialLink: Admin UI component for managing social links, supporting inline editing, adding, removing, and saving links to the backend actor with query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/components/ClinicsSection.t: Public-facing Clinics section that renders a responsive grid of clinic cards with photos, address, phone, and map link using glassmorphism card styling.
A wrapper component that overlays a hover-activated edit button with a pencil icon on any child content, used to trigger edit actions in admin mode.
frontend/src/components/EditModal.tsx: A reusable modal dialog component for editing a set of configurable fields (text, textarea, number, date) with save/cancel actions and loading state.
Renders a 'Follow Us' section displaying social media links as icon cards with platform-specific gradient styles, hiding itself when no links are provided.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A full-featured footer component displaying practice branding, quick navigation links, contact info, opening hours, social media icons, and a copyright bar.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with an optional background image, headline, subheadline, tagline, CTA buttons, and a scroll-down indicator.
frontend/src/components/InlineEditable.t: An inline editing component that toggles between a display view and an input/textarea edit view with save and cancel controls, supporting keyboard shortcuts.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navbar with smooth-scroll navigation, active section tracking via IntersectionObserver, dark/light theme toggle, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/PatientReviewsSe: Displays a grid of patient review cards with star ratings, quote text, and patient avatar initials, sourced from a `PatientReview[]` prop.
Renders a grid of medical service cards with optional icon images or a fallback stethoscope icon, title, and description from a `Service[]` prop.
frontend/src/context/AdminContext.tsx: React context providing admin authentication state (token) stored in sessionStorage, with helpers to set and clear the admin token.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context managing light/dark theme state, persisting the preference to localStorage and applying the 'dark' class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token when authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageUrl.ts: Custom hook that fetches an image by ID and converts its binary data into an object URL, revoking it on cleanup.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider implementing Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/logout functions, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including content sections, images, admin auth, and site configuration.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, plus utility classes for hero, about, services, reviews, and clinics sections.
frontend/src/lib/imageUtils.ts: Utility functions for converting image binary data to object URLs and checking admin login status from sessionStorage.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a collapsible sidebar and tab-based navigation for editing site sections (Hero, About, Services, Reviews, Clinics, Social Links, Footer, Images) and a logout handler.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page with username/password form that calls the actor's login method and invokes an onLogin callback with the returned token on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Top-level admin route component that validates a stored session token on mount and conditionally renders either AdminLogin or AdminDashboard, handling login and logout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public home page that fetches site content and images, resolves image URLs from binary data, and renders all page sections (Navbar, Hero, About, Services, Reviews, Clinics, Social, Footer).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with a custom cobalt/violet/fuchsia color palette, CSS-variable-based semantic colors, custom shadows, gradients, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 15) for Dr. Malay Akechan's professional website, documenting features, architectural notes, known issues (broken light/dark toggle), and tech stack decisions like glassmorphism UI, hardcoded admin credentials, and backend image store.
